message.content:
{
  "summary": "The extraction is largely successful, correctly identifying all line items and the total amounts. However, there are minor discrepancies in the company name (extracting the brand instead of the specific location), the date format, and the inclusion of currency symbols in numeric fields. Additionally, one line item contains a typo in the description.",
  "failure_reasons": [
    "company_name_mismatch",
    "date_format_mismatch",
    "currency_symbol_in_numeric_fields",
    "line_item_description_typo"
  ],
  "field_notes": {
    "company": "Extracted the brand name 'KALAVERAS MEXICAN CUISINE & BAR' instead of the specific location name 'KALAVERAS - BELLFLOWER' used in the gold label.",
    "date": "The date includes a timestamp and uses a different format than the gold label.",
    "subtotal": "Included the '$' symbol.",
    "tax": "Included the '$' symbol.",
    "total": "Included the '$' symbol.",
    "line_items": "The description for the last item contains a typo ('Madurodo' instead of 'Madurado'). The 'raw_text' and 'quantity' fields are null."
  }
}
